text: 1. FILLING our hearts with health and joy, may Vata breathe his balm on us May he prolong our days of life. 2. Thou art our Father, Vata, yea, thou art a Brother and a friend, So give us strength that we may live. 3. The store of Amrta laid away yonder, O Vata, in thine home,- Give us thereof that we may live.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 10 Hymn 186
metadata.citation: Rig Veda, Mandala 10, Hymn 186; Ralph T. H. Griffith translation
